b.style: font-size: 14px; font-family: "Times New Roman"; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(51, 51, 51); text-align: start;

b.style: forced-color-adjust: none; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family: "Times New Roman"; font-style: normal; font-variant-ligatures: normal; font-variant-caps: normal; letter-spacing: normal; orphans: 2; text-align: center; text-indent: 0px; text-transform: none; widows: 2; word-spacing: 0px; -webkit-text-stroke-width: 0px; white-space: normal; text-decoration-thickness: initial; text-decoration-style: initial; text-decoration-color: initial;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(66, 89, 51), rgb(237, 237, 237));
